svg.title: Machine Learning Development Life Cycle (MLDLC)
svg.desc: A flowchart showing 8 stages of MLDLC from problem framing to model optimization

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the problem framing stage in MLDLC in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the data gathering stage in MLDLC in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain data preprocessing in MLDLC in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain Exploratory Data Analysis in MLDLC')
sendPrompt('Explain feature engineering and selection in MLDLC')
sendPrompt('Explain model training, evaluation and selection in MLDLC')
sendPrompt('Explain model deployment and beta testing in MLDLC')
g.text: Deploy to cloud, gather user feedback

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain model optimization and retraining in MLDLC')
